programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco shore
programme.desc: Unas nuevas vacaciones comienzan para los Shore y en esta ocasión la Ciudad de México será testigo de las fiestas, amores, desamores y peleas de la familia más disfuncional de la televisión.

programme.title: Acapulco shore
programme.desc: Después de una noche de golpes, los shore comienzan un nuevo día en el que los hombres de la casa medirán su capacidad de comer mientras las mujeres se animan al calor de unos tragos.

programme.title: Acapulco shore
programme.desc: Dania se disculpa con Chile por la pelea la noche anterior mientras Karime celebra el cumpleaños de su mamá con una botox party.

programme.title: Acapulco shore
programme.desc: Los shore reciben su primera clase de Poll dance y hombres y mujeres competirán por saber quien es el mejor.

programme.desc: Los Shore deciden ir donde una Sexóloga y sus conflictos sexuales salen a flote. Una influecer de la belleza llega a la casa para preparar a los hombre de la casa para una noche muy gay.

programme.title: Acapulco shore
programme.desc: Llega la hora de despedir a Mane y que mejor manera de hacerlo que con una pool party.

programme.desc: Comienza un nuevo día en la casa y todos están molestos con Talia por haber sido mala copa la noche anterior. Karime se lleva a los shore a una limpia con una bruja.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: A sex game brings negative consequences for Santiago and Rocío. Alba and Karime make their engagement official. Chile keeps his promise and gossip brings José and Santiago to blows.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The final party begins and conflicts don't take long to erupt. While some enjoy themselves, others end their relationships. They say goodbye to the house and the best Shore vacation comes to an end.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Acapulco Shore is a story about a group of 20-year-olds who are vacationing in a mansion in Acapulco. Their stay will be filled with love stories, wild parties, drunken nights, and heated arguments. This group is always guaranteed to have fun.

programme.desc: You already know Fernando, Jawy, Tadeo, Caballero, Karime, Manelik, Joyce and Talía. You understand their ability, but will they be able to work? My friends, life isn't all about parties.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: Long-time UFO enthusiast Craig Charles and astrophysicist Sarah Cruddas scrutinize compelling evidence relating to some of the most perplexing UFO encounters of recent years, revealing never before heard testimony to separate fact from fiction.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: The Stephenville UFO case from 2008.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: In 2017, a strange object 800 meters long appears in the solar system; nicknamed 'Oumouamua, it acts in ways that cannot be scientifically explained.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: Craig and Sarah examine a UFO case reported from Pentyrch, South Wales in February 2016; they discuss recent footage and talk with investigators and a prominent eyewitness.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: Craig and Sarah focus on UFO reports from the west coast of Ireland, notably an incident in 2018 when airline pilots experienced multiple sightings.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: A look at the Pentagon's 2020 verification of UFO video footage taken by the U.S. Navy in 2004.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: In December 1980, what is considered the biggest UFO case in U.K. history occurs at the U.S.A.F. base at Rendlesham, Suffolk.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: Craig and Sarah study the evidence available for the mass UFO sighting over Phoenix, Ariz. in 1997.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: An alleged flying disc was seen by ground staff at the O'Hare International Airport in 2006; Craig and Sarah learn that witnesses refused to come forward due to fear of ridicule.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim pulls back the curtain on Season 2, highlighting its ups, downs. She reveals never before seen footage and what happened after Angela got fired. Kim also reveals her styling secrets to having red carpet-worthy hair.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim styles Gabrielle Union. Dontay plots to leave the salon to partner up with Angela, reigniting a feud between Kim and her former protegee. An explosive fight erupts between Anthony and a surprise new hire.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: Kendra and Hank invite Jessica and Kyle over for dinner to share what they've learned at their sex retreat. Kendra takes over the kitchen and shares some fun intimacy games with her friends.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: Kendra's dad, Eric, surprises the family with his new fiancee, Amy. Kendra's happy for her dad but wary of Amy's motives. When things get wild at a Playboy Mansion party, Eric calls Kendra and Hank for help.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: After a wild night at the Playboy Mansion, Kendra wonders if her dad's fiancee, Amy, is in the relationship for the wrong reasons. Amy apologizes and Kendra reluctantly gives her another chance.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: Kendra's wild night out with her friends takes a turn for the worse when late-night clubbing with hot young guys makes Kendra break her promise to Hank, and he's had enough.

programme.title: David Tutera's CELEBrations
programme.desc: Team Tutera gets an offer they can't refuse when Big Ang (Mob Wives) asks them to plan her son's wedding. It's simple: make this a spectacular affair to remember, or David may end up floating in the East River!

programme.title: David Tutera's CELEBrations
programme.desc: Benzino and Althea (Love & Hip Hop) ask David to throw them a last-minute baby shower for their friends and fans. With his own family in town, will David manage to keep both his mom and mom-to-be Althea happy?

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim deals with the aftermath of Lisa and Anthony's big fight. China's sister is the new salon receptionist. Kim gives Macy Gray big hair while Angela ends up in a brawl with Naja at her own salon launch party.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim styles R&B group SWV and opens a pop-up shop in Atlanta. Leah opposes the second location leading to an explosive argument with Kim. Musician Akon reprimands Anthony while Naja's feud with Angela persists.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim and Leah's ATL fight continues back at the salon. Kim styles American Idol winner, Candice Glover. Naja calls Lisa ratchet and Ray J plays referee on the drama that erupts between them.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Trina and Traci embarrass Tamar at her star-studded baby shower. The mood is tense while Tamar and Vince shoot family photos with Miracle. Tamar goes into labor stressed out and has complications right away.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar has a difficult labor, and she and Vince must make a tough decision. Tamar finally gives birth to a baby boy, and the Braxton clan debates names. The couple fights while driving home from the hospital.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar and Vince return to LA and experience highs & lows of new parenthood. Baby has 1st photo shoot. Tamar can't fit into the outfits for her album cover photo; she questions the direction for her album.

programme.title: Mary Mary
programme.desc: Erica finds out how difficult a solo career can be without a manager & the Mary Mary budget. Tina stirs things up with Warryn and her record label by planning her solo project completely on her own.

programme.title: Mary Mary
programme.desc: While Erica is touring and unavailable for her sister, a frustrated "New" Tina tries to keep the "Old" Tina at bay while planning her wedding and meeting Teddy's estranged father for the very first time.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo regresa a la cárcel para enfrentar una venganza de Satanás. Afuera de las rejas, los celos de un hombre influyente pueden poner en riesgo la defensa de Ángela. Elizabeth sospecha que Gustavo miente sobre Aurora. Vicky no quiere divorciarse.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: El miedo de una condena definitiva para Lorenzo termina en un beso con la abogada. Su caso puede salirse de las manos de Ángela por los celos del fiscal. Martín intenta evitar la partida de Vicky, todo por una trampa que les tienden Diana y Ernesto.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Los fantasmas del pasado de Lorenzo pueden convertirse en una condena perpetua. Martín impide a Vicky que viaje jurándole amor real, pero Ernesto y Diana encuentran otro motivo para separarlos. La reunión de Pasión, Catalina y Christian sale mal.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Cuando Ángela trata de armar la defensa de Lorenzo, Félix la chantajea con dejarla ganar el caso a cambio de una noche de pasión; pero ella tiene una carta bajo la manga. César y Blanca deciden darse una oportunidad. Diana intenta matar a Vicky.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: El juicio de Lorenzo inicia con un juego de testimonios encontrados. Ángela enfrenta a Félix, segura de que no ganará su caso. Una cláusula del testamento aleja a Martin de la herencia y lo pone contra las cuerdas. Catalina toma una actitud radical.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Félix se juega su mejor arma con Ernesto para hundir a Lorenzo y logra despertar su rabia con mentiras. Frente al jurado, Félix acusa a Ángela de ser la amante de su defendido. Catalina sale de la cirugía y logra sobrevivir al intento de suicidio.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo logra su libertad por un testigo desconocido que surge a última hora. Todo gracias al apoyo de Ángela, quien se enfrenta al fiscal con la fuerza que emana de un corazón ajeno. Vicky recuerda quién era el hombre enmascarado que la secuestró.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Martín entra en un juego peligroso buscando que una mentira revele la obsesión que tienen Ernesto y Diana contra Vicky. Para eso, acude a la oficina de Ángela en busca de apoyo. Nina encubre a César para que pueda correr en las carreras clandestinas.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Ernesto cae en manos de la ley gracias a Martín y termina confesando su obsesión por Vicky. Pasión se va con Christian a su gira, Martín y Vicky también planean irse de luna de miel, mientras Lorenzo y Ángela empiezan a pasar más tiempo juntos.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Ángela empieza a revelar sus secretos románticos con Lorenzo. Siente un agradecimiento especial, y eso es parte del destino. La obsesión de Ernesto por Vicky parece no tener límites. Vanesa le recrimina a Catalina que nunca la haya querido como hija.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Vicky es víctima otra vez de la obsesión de Ernesto. Él va hasta la playa y la secuestra. Ángela Amenábar está cada vez más cerca de Lorenzo. Juntos, ven un local y deciden ser socios en un nuevo negocio.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Martín sufre al perder nuevamente a Vicky. Las autoridades encuentran un cadáver y todos piensan lo peor. Martín llega al hotel donde está Ernesto. Lorenzo sorprende a Ángela con su ex. Blanca descubre dónde sigue latiendo el corazón de su madre.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Vicky sufre la crueldad de un amor enfermizo que intenta separarla de Martín. Ernesto, en su locura y rabia, termina quemándole la cara a Vicky. Blanca siente miedo de perder a su papá y, con César, encuentran a Lorenzo en casa de Ángela.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Martín es atacado por sus enemigos. Diana lo traiciona, prometiéndole que iba a entregar a su aliado, el peligroso Ernesto. Lorenzo llega a casa de Ángela y ella le confiesa su amor. Un beso despierta emociones que parecían estar en el pasado.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we aim to resurrect the traditional birthday cake. We've developed an honest-to-goodness layer cake with an old-fashioned jam filling and real butter frosting—the type of cake guaranteed to put a smile on anyone's face.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: German chocolate cake—filled with sticky pecans and coconut—is not without flaws. We set out to develop a German chocolate cake that avoids the common pitfalls and delivers on its promise.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to make a meatloaf with well-seasoned meat and just enough binder to give the loaf a tender, not tough, texture. In choosing a side dish to partner with our meatloaf, we turned to another old-fashioned dish—skillet-roasted potatoes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Dinners prepared entirely in one skillet are perfect for weeknight cooking. Less cleanup is one obvious benefit. A skillet also gives the cook a bit more control over cooking multiple elements.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bryan shows Julia a top-secret recipe for North Carolina Dipped Fried Chicken. Then, Jack challenges Bridget to a tasting of chocolate ice cream. And finally, Ashley makes Bridget a classic version of North Carolina Lemon Pie.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Christie makes Julia the perfect Hearty Beef Lasagna. Then, Jack challenges Bridget to a tasting of block mozzarella. And finally, Lan Lam makes Bridget a new weeknight favorite—Chicken Scarpariello.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Julia and Bridget make a Lone Star State classic—Flank Steak in Adobo. Then, Adam reveals his top pick for inexpensive blenders. And finally, Ashley shows Julia how to make the ultimate Texas Breakfast Tacos.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Christie shows Julia how to make Oregon Blackberry Pie. Then, Adam shows Bridget his top pick for pie plates. Next, Jack challenges Julia to a tasting of ready-made pie crusts. Finally, Bridget and Julia make Roasted Salmon with Broccoli and Red Potatoes.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia makes her favorite picnic chicken; a fast tortellini salad with cherry tomatoes, arugula, and pine nuts; and Pimms cup for a crowd.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: It's burger night in the Davison house and Julia's got all the fixings: home ground beef, crispy homefries, and her all-time favorite condiment, homemade pickled onions.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia's weekend plans include her favorite cast-iron chicken chilaquiles with homemade hot sauce, refreshing micheladas, and restaurant-inspired fried ice cream cake.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Beef, beer, and onions have a natural affinity—it's one reason burgers and onion rings are often on bar menus. In a carbonnade, the beef melds with the soft sweetness of sliced onions in a lightly thickened broth that is rich, deep, and satisfying.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted a streamlined version of roast chicken with plenty of stuffing to go around. First, we needed to solve the problem of cooking the stuffing to a safe temperature without drying out the delicate breast meat of the chicken.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Boneless pork chops are lean and quick-cooking, making them ideal for weeknight meals. Pork tenderloin, which is also lean, has a somewhat fussy reputation, but you don't need to be a professional chef to cook tenderloin properly.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We make a fresh-tasting, quick tamale pie with a juicy, spicy mixture of meat and vegetables and a quick homemade-cornbread topping. We also show you how to cook up a really flavorful chicken stew topped with a biscuit crust.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Whether we admit it or not, there are some dishes that are a little too high in fat and calories to be enjoyed on a regular basis. Even a modest portion of macaroni and cheese or chicken Parmesan is prohibitive. But that doesn't need to be the case.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to be able to serve English-style fish and chips—large pieces of moist and delicate cod in a crisp and tender coating with thick-cut fries—at home.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Commonly found at catered events, this once-highbrow dish has become a bit of a joke. But after preparing several cookbook versions, we realized that pairing a crisp-fried coating with a delicate butter sauce was a great idea that deserved a revival.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: While the hallmark of this filet mignon is its tender texture, some argue that the beefy flavor is too mild, lacking the oomph of fattier cuts like rib eye. So we aim to boost the filet mignon's flavor with a peppercorn crust and a rich pan sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We love a good stir-fry served with rice, but a noodle cake, a savory round of tender noodles sautéed in a skillet until the exterior is crisp, is also a great base for a saucy stir-fry.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We prepare a Thai-inspired beef stir-fry and share a recipe for great potstickers.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We create tasty versions of two Tex-Mex favorites: chicken fajitas and huevos rancheros.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Just when we think we've become familiar with every Italian dish under the sun, we're pleasantly surprised to come across one we've somehow overlooked—Spaghetti with Marinara Sauce.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Fifty years ago, steak Diane was prepared tableside and included a burst of pyrotechnics supplied by a match and some cognac. Sure, such theatrics might seem a bit dated and silly, but they are essential to the flavor of the dish. We explain why.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Most of us might not have time to prepare eggs during the week, but come the weekend, eggs are a terrific way to begin a leisurely day. In this episode, we take a look at a couple of our favorite egg dishes—scrambled eggs and omelets.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we show you how the strangest-sounding methods can sometimes be the most rewarding and how a few easy tricks can give an old standby, like roast chicken, a new lift.

programme.desc: Conservative host John Fredericks shares his views.

programme.desc: Unique perspectives and commentaries on current events.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Mutual Benefits buys life insurance policies from AIDS patients, the chronically ill and seniors and fraudulently resells them as low risk investments to clients.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A once $100 million publishing fortune creates tension between mother and son when he's accused of squandering millions on sex, diamonds and fraud.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A femme fatale with a way of getting men to do what she wants, sets a trap for a multi-millionaire divorcee.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Scammers blow up a house for insurance money, but end up engulfing dozens of homes in flames and killing a young couple.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: By promising enormous returns on a work-from-home scheme selling TelexFree phone service, Carlos Wanzeler and James Merrrill entice nearly one million people in an extraordinary $1.7 billion internet scam.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: Zachary Horwitz has dreams of making it big in Hollywood; while his onscreen career never quite flourishes, Horwitz acts his way into raising more than $600 million for an investment opportunity that is completely bogus.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: When the FTC fines Infomercial kingpin Kevin Trudeau $37.6 million for all of his get-rich-quick schemes, he claims he's flat broke; Remington Financial Group's "advance fee" scam has cost small business owners their dreams and millions of dollars.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: A promoter steals musical artists' money and dreams; an ex-IRS agent is caught in a $13 million accounting fraud and uses taxpayer money plotting to murder those who know too much.

programme.desc: Sango's brother Kohaku is being manipulated by Naraku and is after Kagome's life.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha and the gang overcome Naraku's trap involving Kohaku.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha transforms into a demon when his life is in danger. He quickly destroys Gatenmaru, who has become a giant moth.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha visits Totosai's workplace by himself. The Tetsusaiga was broken by Goshinki, and Inuyasha's own fang was used to repair it.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Ryukotsusei knocks away the Tetsusaiga, and Inuyasha transforms into a demon.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bruno et al head to Marco Polo airport to venture to Sardegna to discover the truth behind Trish’s father. On the tarmac, however, is a swollen, neckless Stand user who, the team discovers while airborne, is linked to the freshly severed fingers onboard

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: At cruising altitude, Trish faces a voracious and fleshy mass of a Stand that strikes at the slightest movement. Meanwhile, Giorno’s incessantly pulsating broach, the key to the team’s survival, lies waiting—as does an unseen force within Trish.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bruno and team make an emergency landing in Sardegna where the Hitman Team leader, Risotto, is also determined to uncover a certain mystery. Doppio, a timid, wide-eyed teen, the result of a seemingly impossible pregnancy, has his own goals on the island.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Having discovered there is more to skittish Doppio than meets the eye, Risotto uses his Stand to manifest various metallic instruments of torture from within his enemy. Fortunately for Doppio, a way to foresee the inevitable offers a glimmer of hope.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: A picturesque Sardinian cliff becomes the bloody backdrop to Doppio’s sudden dominance over Risotto, courtesy of Narancia’s own Stand. On the beach below, Abbacchio works to rewind time 15 years to identify the identity of a certain photographer.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Witness destiny unfold for Trish and the rest of Bruno’s team as her father’s cryptic presence and arcane abilities pull the crew into battles of unspeakable brutality.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: With Abbacchio’s replaying ability interminably stamped in stone, Bruno and team analyze the cryptic face and fingerprints left behind when a mysterious call arrives.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: No sooner than Bruno and team set foot on the shore near Rome the team finds a flesh-eating mold devouring everyone in sight. It's the work of Cioccolata, made worse by his partner Secco, who records the tortured faces of his victims to be viewed later.

programme.desc: Oohara Midori got her swimsuit designs stolen by her declining mentor.

programme.desc: A politician wants to silence a Shinto prophetess who knows too much.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Witness destiny unfold for Trish and the rest of Bruno’s team as her father’s cryptic presence and arcane abilities pull the crew into battles of unspeakable brutality.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: With Abbacchio’s replaying ability interminably stamped in stone, Bruno and team analyze the cryptic face and fingerprints left behind when a mysterious call arrives.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: No sooner than Bruno and team set foot on the shore near Rome the team finds a flesh-eating mold devouring everyone in sight. It's the work of Cioccolata, made worse by his partner Secco, who records the tortured faces of his victims to be viewed later.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Oohara Midori got her swimsuit designs stolen by her declining mentor.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: A politician wants to silence a Shinto prophetess who knows too much.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Ryou protects an audition with 20 candidates, one is interested in the director.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: A Heike princess comes to visit the capital and is followed by trouble.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Because of the incident with Koga, Kagome has a fight with Inuyasha and goes back to the present day.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kagome returns to the present day. She is busy preparing for a mock exam two days later.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Sango finds the bodies of her father and the other slayers at the ruins of Naraku's castle.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Sango's brother Kohaku is being manipulated by Naraku and is after Kagome's life.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha and the gang overcome Naraku's trap involving Kohaku.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha transforms into a demon when his life is in danger. He quickly destroys Gatenmaru, who has become a giant moth.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha visits Totosai's workplace by himself. The Tetsusaiga was broken by Goshinki, and Inuyasha's own fang was used to repair it.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Ryukotsusei knocks away the Tetsusaiga, and Inuyasha transforms into a demon.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bruno et al head to Marco Polo airport to venture to Sardegna to discover the truth behind Trish’s father. On the tarmac, however, is a swollen, neckless Stand user who, the team discovers while airborne, is linked to the freshly severed fingers onboard

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: At cruising altitude, Trish faces a voracious and fleshy mass of a Stand that strikes at the slightest movement. Meanwhile, Giorno’s incessantly pulsating broach, the key to the team’s survival, lies waiting—as does an unseen force within Trish.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneer Izzie Balmer and dealer David Harper travel around Fife, Perthshire and Angus searching for profitable antiques. A very rare jar causes excitement at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer and David Harper shop for antiques in the Highlands. It's the final leg of their thoroughly enjoyable 'Mini' break and neither wants to say goodbye to bonnie Scotland!

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine and Steven Moore are antiques hunting in the Northeast. Vintage luggage and a pill box surprise at auction, while Steven gets familiar with a Sunderland sailor's story.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the second leg of their trip, Steven Moore and Roo Irvine are in the Northeast. This time there are underwater treasures, patriotic portraits and the odd bargain. What fun!

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Scotland's Roo Irvine and Steven Moore from Newcastle search for antiques in Yorkshire. Expect flat caps, pork pies and some Chinese porcelain that earns one expert a great profit.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Steven Moore and Roo Irvine cruise around lovely Lancashire. There's great expectation for a Charles Dickens find but the most auction excitement is for a tribal paddle.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Glass expert Roo Irvine and ceramics whizz Steven Moore make their way around Lancashire and Cumbria. It's their final chance to be crowned winner of this Road Trip.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita Marriott and Phil Serrell embark on a new Road Trip. Purchases include a garden fountain and a home-made post box. Phil wears shorts and Irita runs away to the circus.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita and Phil encounter a great bustard and a lesser spotted Dunhill while touring Norfolk and Lincolnshire. Phil also turns magpie with the silver but who will fly at auction?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil spends every last penny, while Irita buys a vase for a pound. Irita favours mutton sleeves in Hull, while Phil steps out of the classic car to be turned into a pumpkin.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita and Phil are in the Northeast and, after losing three auctions in a row, Phil fights back with a huge Methodist church sign! Will it pay off or will Irita do it again?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's Irita and Phil's last outing in the gold classic car and the pressure gauge is reading high! Can Mr Serrell clutch victory just as they race towards the finish line?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Norfolk, Irita Marriott finds a 19th century automaton and learns about a hero from The Great War. Raj Bisram buys a damaged Stoneware Doulton flask and discovers how Princess Catherine helped rescue Jewish families from Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Up in Northamptonshire, Irita Marriott picks up a B&B sign and a Japanese Satsuma pot, while Raj Bisram finds an Art Deco silver trinket box and a kaleidoscope from 1905. Plus a visit to the only surviving medieval town belfry in England.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit the Royal Ballet School in Richmond Park where they find a table purportedly made from the Old London Bridge.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects in this episode include a rare 18th-century glass bought for 10p from a charity shop and a pair of Queen Victoria's amazingly large knickers.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts travel to Wentworth Woodhouse, a palace in south Yorkshire where they encounter a bureau once owned by Earl Fitzwilliam.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects under inspection include a special medal awarded for kindness to pit ponies and a valuable painted Georgian tea tray.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The show's 35th year is marked by a very special visit from Her Majesty the Queen.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Antiques Roadshow visits Kirby Hall in Northamptonshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Antiques Roadshow is back among the ruins of Kirby Hall in Northamptonshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Antiques Roadshow returns to Scone Palace in Perthshire, Scotland.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Antiques Roadshow welcomes visitors to Derby's Roundhouse.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Finds include an intricate bamboo pot and a valuable piece of Star Wars memorabilia.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: An amazing update about an ornate French plant stand last seen on the Roadshow in 1991.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Scientists reveal the magic behind owls' superpowers.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Elle and Inga, 17-year-old cousins from Norway, herd reindeer; they and their families accompany reindeer herds on an annual migration.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals never-before-screened secrets of giant armadillo life.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A mother moose and her calf struggle to survive in the Canadian wilderness while facing wolves, swarms of biting flies and Arctic weather.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: A leopard mother and her cubs fight to survive, and resort to fishing for food, in the wilds of Botswana.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates this astonishing story of a wild cheetah family, revealing in intimate detail what it takes to turn tiny cubs into accomplished predators.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: The story of two mountain lions trying to raise their young unfolds in the Rocky Mountain range of Wyoming.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: At the jungle animal hospital, a dedicated team nurse their exotic patients back to health and prepare a troop of spider monkeys and a flock of scarlet macaws for their release.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Only one man can swim amongst breaching great white sharks as they hunt.

programme.title: Sharks: On Their Best Behavior
programme.desc: Filmmaker Mike deGruy examines shark evolution, hunting, feeding, reproduction and defenses.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: From enormous tortoises and deep-diving lizards to fish-eating snakes and birds that hunt giant venomous centipedes, the wildlife of the world-famous Galapagos Islands is unique and bizarre.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Otters are playful, adaptable and champion swimmers: they've captivated cameraman Charlie Hamilton James for the last 25 years; through the eyes of three orphaned river otters, Charlie reveals their survival secrets and why they're so special.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel shows how versatile ingredients in a weekly shop can be; duck and citrus salad, hot yogurt steak and chocolate beetroot cake.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20
programme.desc: Catalina se entera de la muerte de su hermano por medio de la Diabla. Marcial se entera por medio de Pelambre que su mujer anda besándose con Albeiro, el hombre lo manda asesinar. Catalina descubre el romance de su novio y su mamá.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21
programme.desc: El Titi es capturado y extraditado por la DEA. A Catalina le extraen la prótesis por el dolor tan fuerte que estaba sufriendo. Jessica hace el amor con Marcial, le cuenta cosas malas de su amiga. Catalina es llevada a urgencias por Pelambre.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep2
programme.desc: Albeiro es seducido por el cuerpo de la madre de Catalina. Catalina es violada en el establo por los hombres de Mariño. Bairon rechaza a Jimena pues él se percata que ella se va diariamente como acompañante con los mafiosos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A successful St. Louis, MO, restaurateur risks everything when she decides to add a downtown sports bar to her portfolio and put her out-of-control nephew in charge.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is brought in to save The Sandbar in Albuquerque, New Mexico, but before he can save the failing beach-themed bar, he has to figure out who the actual owner is first.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An unappealing name is just the first of many problems plaguing Fatballs Sports Bar & Grill, where Jon must get a belligerent owner to accept responsibility.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must teach four bickering Irish sisters how to manage conflict between one another so they can finally start managing their bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon goes head-to-head with a stubborn owner and self-proclaimed nightlife expert who's resistant to implementing any changes.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help two burnout rockers turned bar owners grow up in order to save their business, which is currently losing $100,000 a year.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owner of Joe's Thirsty Lizard, a failing Mississippi dive bar, compounds his troubles by promoting a dishwasher with no experience to manager.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is called in to help the failing owner of Baseline Sports Bar, whose sexually exploitive spaghetti wrestling events have driven away female customers.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon visits a Las Vegas dive to teach the owner of Jack's Place how to act less like a mother and more like a boss.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon steps in to save J.A. Murphy's, a dive bar in Fell's Point, MD, on the brink of financial and physical collapse.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps Justin and Michael, a pair of strippers who own The End Zone bar in Houston, put aside their differences before they lose more than just their shirts.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After a fatal club shooting, Jon must work to rehabilitate the reputation of the Mystique Lounge in West Palm Beach, FL.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must go to war with the rowdy regulars of a Southern California dive bar once a popular haven for smokers until forced to comply with the law.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon returns to Puerto Rico, where he used to live, to rescue a bar destroyed by Hurricane Maria and to help revive the rest of the community.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Veteran lifeguard Jack 'JD' Darius has a dark secret in his past. He comes to Baywatch to throw his rescue can in the ring for the open Lieutenant slot, but young and ambitious Taylor Walsh also wants the job, and she's ready to fight for it.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch, Sky, and April find a dead man on the ocean floor. Their search for answers to his demise leads to the retirement home where he lived, and his two friends who seem to be hiding the true story. The chemistry between Cody and Lani heats up.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: April is devastated by her younger brother Charlie’s terminal illness. Mitch and Hobie want to make sure Charlie's wishes are granted, and that the time he spends with the lifeguards at Baywatch is the best of his life.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline's acting career isn't going well so she returns to Baywatch to figure out what she really wants to do with her life. The lifeguards are plagued by a sleaze-ball helicopter reporter who somehow knows intimate details about their love lives.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After the devastation of the last big L.A. earthquake, Baywatch lifeguards are taking recent Seismic activity seriously. Caroline and JD 's tempestuous relationship heats up, forcing Caroline to make a critical decision that could change her life.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The hot Santa Ana winds blow an air of mystery to Baywatch when two sea lions perish in an unexplainable event. Mitch must uncover the cause to stop it from happening again. April is courted by Manny and Hobie, forcing her to choose between them.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Donna tries to help Neely overcome her addiction to painkillers. Craig Pomeroy shows up at Baywatch to defend the legal rights of an elderly Native American shaman determined to initiate his tribe's traditional death ritual on the Baywatch beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cody ignores regulations and leaves his tower five minutes early to meet Lani for a hot date. Right after he leaves, a young woman goes swimming and is engulfed by a wave, never to reappear. Cody is tortured by the results of his negligence.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline's truck is hijacked by a young thief who forces her to drive him on a wild getaway chase. Neely reveals a shocking secret about her outrageous actions during her hiatus from Baywatch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Prejudice threatens Manny and April's relationship, driving April into Craig's comforting arms. An encounter with sharks leads Craig and April to take shelter in a water treatment plant's intake pipe where they encounter even more danger!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch learns that a cache of US Marine weapons has been stolen and probably hidden offshore. Mitch and Cody locate a sunken vessel with the arms on board, but before they can confiscate them, they are taken captive.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After breaking up with Manny, April finds romance with Craig, who is having a mid-life crisis. While working together to catch a trio of wild men on waverunners harassing swimmers, Craig and April's passion heats up.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch uses Hobie to initiate a relationship with Hobie's horseback riding instructor. Cody, JD, and Lani try to make extra cash in a scheme to collect Sea Urchins, but when another diver gets into trouble, Lani puts her life at risk to save him.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Garner enlists Mitch’s help to track down and capture a ring of drug smugglers operating from a boat offshore. The stakes get deadly when Neely goes undercover to plant a bug and her cover is blown! Lani struggles to come to terms with her deafness.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: If you dread Valentine's Day and don't have a creative bone in your body, take heart, because Dr. Phil and Robin are here to help the romantically challenged!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bleach, Keys, Bologna": all used as retaliation weapons. Dr. Phil, criminal atty Anthony Pope, & revenge expert Dr. Gina Barreca discuss--such as use of superglue on a man's private parts & also, Michael Brewer, 15, badly burned over a stolen bike. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heather's son, Brandon, 15, died of an accidental overdose at her home; authorities say the teen swallowed & snorted Heather's morphine pills while drinking vodka and beer. Acquitted of charges, Heather says her ex-husband Brian continues to blame her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The outrageous accusations & animosity continues between warring exes Libby & Brian. What happened that prompted Dr. Phil to consider asking Brian to leave and not return?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Kaye, Hear from Kathy's daughter who sides with Kaye. Plus, who is "Aaron?" Dr. Phil digs deep in search of answers -- tune in to see the results of the investigation! Is Kaye being scammed? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil takes an intense look at the life of Star, a stay-at-home mom who fears that her dangerous habit may take a turn for the worse. Star's 11-year-old daughter, Autumn, sends Dr. Phil a poignant plea for help before tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Fred & Cynthia say daughter, Crystal, is raising her young son in a death trap! No running water, leaky ceiling, exposed wires, smoking electrical sockets, mice & mold! They are ready for CPS. Crystal says her home is a visible form of how she feels.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Caylee Anthony's mom, Casey Anthony, has been named a person of interest in the case of the missing 3-year-old. Many fear the worst has happened. Dr. Phil examines the psychological aspects of the story that continues to grip America's imagination.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jennifer claims her family has been the victim of hackers for 2 years. The problem is her husband, Billy, thinks she is the hacker! Things are so bad that Billy has asked for a divorce. Jennifer says she wants to clear her name & save her marriage! Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2011, Morgan, 20, was found dead, a suspected overdose with a later ruling of death by suicide. Parents Toni & Steve believe something more sinister: she was stalked, tormented & killed by Brooke, 18, who joins the show with her dad, Jim.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Alethea feels trapped in a rage-filled relationship with her partner Kevin. She says "The Hulk," also known as "Kevin's anger," is so off the charts, even strangers call police. Kevin says his rage is a result of brain trauma. See MRI brain scan results.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Leah says mom Dora appears sweet but she's actually a narcissist, hypochondriac, drama queen & liar. Can this mother-daughter find common ground and rebuild? Plus Carrie says mom Paula, 61, has been meeting strangers online having sex. Dr. Phil weighs in.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil conducts an emotionally-charged intervention with Bobbi Kristina Brown's boyfriend, Nick Gordon, who is battling drug & alcohol addiction and struggling to come to terms with Bobbi's near-drowning & Whitney Houston's death. Will Nick accept help?

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: An amateur flautist is shot with his own gun on the wealthy Bottrell family's land, but Wycliffe suspects this supposed suicide is not what it appears.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Wycliffe investigates the murder of a local undertaker who was swapped out for the usual life-size effigy villagers light aflame and hurl into the sea every year as part of an ancient ritual.

programme.title: Wycliffe

programme.title: Morning Buzz

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está buscando un autobús escolar desaparecido lleno de alumnos en Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un seguidor de un conocido orador motivacional es asesinado, el equipo sospecha del propio orador.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños rituales de asesinato conducen al equipo en busca del asesino.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Almas perdidas
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un conductor ebrio que mató a una madre y su hijo, Danny y Baez se debaten entre cumplir con su deber y buscar justicia al descubrir la conexión entre el sospechoso y la víctima.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuesta alta
programme.desc: Cuando el hermano de Linda, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se mete en problemas con la mafia, le suplica a Danny que lo ayude a mantenerse a salvo hasta que la situación se calme

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La sombra de la duda
programme.desc: Jamie y Eddie investigan cuando una mujer sufre una reacción alérgica a su medicación y descubren que su esposo, un técnico de emergencia, no respondió a la llamada de emergencia pese a estar asignado para hacerlo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un triste adiós
programme.desc: Danny investiga las circunstancias de la desaparición de una ex oficial de la Policía de Nueva York que desaparece al día siguiente de revelarle que planeaba hacer las paces con la mujer que ella y su compañero condenaron injustamente años atrás.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Policía bueno, policía malo
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver de un marine aparece al otro lado del mundo, la investigación obliga a Ziva a desenterrar un capítulo enterrado de su vida.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Código de conducta
programme.desc: Cuando un marine conocido por sus bromas pesadas es encontrado muerto en la víspera de Halloween, el equipo del NCIS descubre que las bromas "inocentes" de la víctima pueden haber inspirado una venganza macabra.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fugitivos y consuelo
programme.desc: Una investigación de asesinato lleva a Gibbs y al equipo a hacer de consejero familiar de su antiguo mentor, Mike Franks, con la esperanza de evitar un sangriento conflicto internacional.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fin del juego
programme.desc: Con la ayuda del equipo, Vance se enfrenta a sus demonios mientras descubre una compleja relación con un asesino que pone en peligro a toda su familia.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo investiga los cadáveres quemados de varios indigentes cerca del muelle de Santa Mónica en California.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está buscando un autobús escolar desaparecido lleno de alumnos en Washington, D.C.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un seguidor de un conocido orador motivacional es asesinado, el equipo sospecha del propio orador.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Walt hopes to get lucky with one of Lauren's friends, Hott Dogg worries that Daddy will never get over Lil Bit, and Mattie is insulted after Murray pays her bar tab.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Everyone meets Mattie's angry alter ego Martha, and the boys try to take Daddy out for a guys' night to get his mind off Hott Dogg, which completely backfires.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Daddy and Hott Dogg can't seem to get back to normal after she sees that he's not ready for anything serious, and the gang heads down to Louisiana to see their parents.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The Louisianimals travel to New Orleans where Mattie ends her dry spell, but the same can't be said for Daddy and Hott Dogg.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Daddy and Hott Dogg try to sort out their relationship on their own, but Tiffany keeps butting in because she's worried that it's just another Lil Bit situation.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Mattie competes in a bikini contest at Mudfest, Hott Dogg has an encounter with Martha, and everyone tries to tie up loose ends on the last day of vacation.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Christine Lakin sits down with Daddy, Tiffany, and Walt to talk about reuniting for season three, view never-before-seen clips and chat with a special guest.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin invites eight hardcore female athletes to visit the ranch to battle through Snatch, Water Logged and The Crate before one competitor gets her shot at the Skullbuster and $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight tough-as-nails athletes are ready to throw down. But will they have what it takes to get through Trench Warfare, Pole Dancer and Chain Gang?

programme.desc: Eight rough and tough female athletes must face off in Trench Warfare, Pole Dancer and Chain Gang before they get a chance at the Skullbuster and a shot at $10,000 if they can beat the current benchmark time.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight male athletes compete in Summit, High & Dry and Cranked for a chance to win $10,000. Who will outlast his competition and challenge the toughest course in America?

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight men come to the Broken Skull Ranch to battle one another in Rip Off, Loaded and Dead Weight. But will the last man standing defeat the Skullbuster and walk away with the $10,000?

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge

programme.desc: Eight male athletes tussle in Drag Race, Pile Up and Splinter. But only one man gets to take on the Skullbuster for a shot at $10,000.

programme.title: Amanpour: Sex and Love Around the World

programme.title: Crimes of the Century

programme.title: Crimes of the Century

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a mental health crisis, a man runs from police when approached, and officers recognize a burglary suspect as someone they've tangled with before.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The victim of the home invasion robbery tells a dispatch operator that a man held him at gun-point. A man in a wheelchair is in a stand-off with campus police. Officers respond to a call about a knife-wielding assailant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects wreck their vehicle while attempting to evade police in a hot pursuit. Officers respond to a domestic dispute involving neighbors. A suspect abandons his truck and shoes while running from Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer on street patrol chases down a suspect on foot, an alleged car thief posts his exploits on Facebook, and a crashed stolen car may not have been stolen after all.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a man suspected of robbery. A riot erupts at a juvenile party on the beach. Officers find an intoxicated man stuck on an iron fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen being driven backwards on a one-way street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver tries to escape through an occupied driveway, a man and his dad are found possessing more than just drugs, and five teenagers learn how weed can impact their future.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After chasing down a suspect on foot, officers retrieve a fully loaded revolver from his pants, and police respond to a call about a man wielding a knife outside a bar.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man flees from cops and reaches a dead end. A 40mm impact round is used to gain compliance when he reaches for his pockets. A man claims his anger got the best of him during an armed robbery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is arrested after officers find a loaded gun during a routine search. Two men are detained after suspected of battery. During Mardi Gras officers arrest a man pickpocketing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver leaves her car during a routine traffic stop, officers stop a car that appears to have fake tags, and police respond to an altercation between a father and son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wild-eyed man leads police on a chase that ends in a Tasing, officers respond to an in-progress lovers' spat, and a traffic stop results in drug and auto theft charges.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The passenger of a fleeing driver makes his own getaway, a motorcyclist in a high-speed pursuit narrowly misses a car, and police respond to a disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bloodied man prowls around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle and seize drugs belonging to a passenger who is arrested. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A convenience store sprinter bets officers he'll get away next time, matching bullets help solve an armed robbery, and a trucker takes his family on a supersized car chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers set up a sting designed to capture unsuspecting bicycle thieves. An Officer conducts a routine traffic stop on a vehicle with fraudulent tags. An officer pulls over a vehicle after observing a suspected prostitute enter the vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman tells officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A neighborhood patrol investigates a car with no plates, a man walking in the street takes off when approached by officers, and a man breaks down as police search his vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A patrol car en route to a call spooks a driver who then takes off at high speed, leading the officers to pursue him instead, and police investigate shots fired on a home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man tries to jump out of a car when his friend takes him on a high-speed chase, and a deputy investigates a man he finds walking down a dark road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disastrous carjacking results in an arrest. Officers make an arrest in a domestic abuse call involving two women. Officers find drug paraphernalia on a man who’s suspiciously parked in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to an armed robbery and carjacking, the suspects are arrested on several charges. A concerned sister reports a fight between her brother and a heavyset burglar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a murder suspect who is caught red-handed, burying the victims, while Catherine and Warrick take on the case of a woman found dead in a hotel spa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Nick investigate the death of a book restorer, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a fatal train crash.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the apparent violent death of a woman found in a sandbox. Their investigation leads them to the underground world of s and m clubs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a casino heist during which innocent victims were shot, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a murder in a remote part of the desert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is in charge for the first time as the team investigates the murder of the con artist, who has run off with some tourists' money only to get shot and killed in the parking lot. The prime suspect in the case turns out to be Captain Brass' daughter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in when a famous real estate entrepreneur is found dead in a hotel elevator.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara are called to the crime scene when two murder victims are found hidden in pipes at a construction site in the middle of an alfalfa field, while Catherine and Nick investigate an ostensible hunting accident.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom's nemesis, serial killer Paul Millander, reappears and claims a third victim in this gripping episode.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine is ordered by a kidnapper to accompany a man who is to deliver $1 million in ransom to him or else he will kill the man's mistress.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investigates the murder of a Las Vegas photographer whose remains were dumped at a nearby body farm.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine and Sara are called in to investigate when a hockey player dies during a practice. Warrick and Nick look into the apparent drug-related death of a sax player at a casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investigates the murders of four monks who were shot point-blank while chanting in a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A bus carrying 23 passengers from Los Angeles to Las Vegas crashes less than 40 miles from its destination, killing nine people.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Jane Galloway is a nervous breakdown waiting to happen. She has completely shielded herself from the outside world, but that doesn't stop a stalker in her attic from killing her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan a un sospechoso de asesinato al que pillan in fraganti enterrando a las víctimas, mientras Catherine y Warrick se encargan del caso de una mujer encontrada muerta en el spa de un hotel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Nick investigan la muerte de un restaurador de libros mientras Catherine y Sara son llamadas al lugar de un accidente de tren mortal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Catherine investigan la aparente muerte violenta de una mujer encontrada en un arenero. Su investigación les lleva al mundo clandestino de los clubes de s y m.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan un atraco a un casino durante el cual se disparó a víctimas inocentes, mientras que Catherine y Sara son llamadas a la escena de un asesinato en un lugar remoto del desierto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick se pone al mando por primera vez cuando el equipo investiga el asesinato del estafador, que ha huido con el dinero de unos turistas sólo para ser tiroteado y asesinado en el aparcamiento.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado cuando un famoso empresario inmobiliario aparece muerto en el ascensor de un hotel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Sara son llamados a la escena del crimen cuando dos víctimas de asesinato aparecen ocultas en las tuberías de una obra en construcción en medio de un campo de alfalfa, mientras Catherine y Nick investigan un ostensible accidente de caza.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La némesis de Grissom, el asesino en serie Paul Millander, reaparece y se cobra una tercera víctima en este apasionante episodio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un secuestrador ordena a Catherine que acompañe a un hombre que debe entregarle un rescate de un millón de dólares o, de lo contrario, matará a la amante del hombre.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investiga el asesinato de un fotógrafo de Las Vegas cuyos restos fueron arrojados a una granja de cadáveres cercana.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine y Sara tienen que investigar la muerte de un jugador de hockey durante un entrenamiento. Warrick y Nick investigan la aparente muerte relacionada con las drogas de un saxofonista en un casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investiga los asesinatos de cuatro monjes que fueron tiroteados a quemarropa mientras cantaban en un templo budista.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un autobús que transportaba 23 pasajeros de Los Ángeles a Las Vegas se estrella a menos de 40 millas de su destino, matando a nueve personas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Jane Galloway está a punto de sufrir un ataque de nervios. Se ha protegido completamente del mundo exterior, pero eso no impide que un acosador en su ático la mate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a police officer is shot to death while on the job, the CSIs track who he saw while that night and learn that he picked-up a call girl.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: CSIs investigate the lives of those living in a high-end airpark after a prop plane crashes into a local Miami beach hot spot.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A security guard is found dead after shots ring out at rap star 10-Large’s concert and the CSI are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When evidence at a murder investigation leads the CSIs to believe the killer may be in NYC, Horatio takes his investigation to the Big Apple.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An adult film actress is found strangled to death in the park and the CSIs are called in to investigate and find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A dangerous investigation leads the CSI team down a treacherous road that will lead to the tragic loss of one of their own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Yelina's life is in danger when the Horatio and the CSI team works a case to convict a rapper suspected of a Miami-style drive-by.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A flash mob erupts on a private golf course, where the group of students there to hide a body or were they there to leave one.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A woman is pushed in front of a moving Metrorail train and both her boyfriend and his stalker ex-girlfriend are suspected of her murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami’s club scene turns deadly when underage drinking sparks a bloody murder in a bathroom stall, Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A jury field trip to the scene of a murder flips the legal tables when the defendant ends up dead and the twelve jurors become the prime suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A “Speed Dating” night for Miami singles turns deadly for one South Beach stud who finds himself on the wrong end of a tire iron.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami Beach is evacuated for a tsunami, but the CSI team remains after discovering a bank robbery plot while investigating a seemingly random murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A string of dead bodies, found off the coast of Miami, turns out to be the work of modern-day pirates. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio descubre un complot mortal contra la ciudad de Miami después de que una joven es asesinada en un evento benéfico. Él y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un reclutador de marines es asesinado, el equipo de CSI debe adentrarse en el mundo del reclutamiento de soldados y las familias que dejan atrás.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Están juzgando a Sonya Barak por ayudar en un complot para destruir Miami cuando su propia gente intenta matarla a tiros. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan al exmarido de Natalia, la evidencia sugiere que ella lo mató. Muchas personas tenían motivos para matar a Nick. Horatio y los CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La vida del detective Frank Tripp pende de un hilo cuando pisa una mina terrestre mientras investiga la escena de un crimen. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando secuestran un camión lleno de armas confiscadas y devuelven las armas al público, Horatio relaciona el crimen con Clavo Cruz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Declaran muerto a un miembro del equipo tras recibir un disparo en la cabeza. No queriendo darse por vencido, Horatio hace que el equipo de CSI corra al hospital.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben investigar cuando los padres de una niñera en un vecindario exclusivo son brutalmente asesinados.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un fin de semana de caza se vuelve mortal cuando un oso ataca a alguien del grupo y la evidencia sugiere un crimen. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un rico promotor inmobiliario, Horatio y el equipo de CSI sospecha de la esposa y las dos hermanas gemelas secretas de ella.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio sospecha que el supervisor del condado y los dueños de un casino de nativos norteamericanos cercano pueden estar involucrados cuando se encuentra a una víctima de asesinato sin el cuero cabelludo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo investigan la muerte de una estrella de cine mientras se encontraba en un centro de rehabilitación de celebridades y estaba a punto de exponer algunos secretos dañinos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un divorcio desagradable empeora aún más cuando la amante del marido aparece muerta y, a medida que aumenta el cantidad de muertos, Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio investiga un caso de venganza contra un ex-amante despreciado. Los problemas personales de un miembro de CSI manchan la investigación y Horatio se ve obligado a despedirlo.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The electrocution of a young man on the third rail of the subway leads into the world of an extreme sport where taking risks is part of the game.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Competitive dog owners become the prime suspects in a murder investigation when Detective Mac Taylor examines the death of a dog trainer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The investigation of a suburban kid found beaten to death in Van Cortland Park leads the CSI team to Tanglewood, home to a group of wannabe gangsters.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera uncover the body of a teenaged boy crammed into a 2’ x 2’ x 2’ box buried in the sand at Coney Island.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Mac Taylor and Danny Messer find themselves on the trail of an elusive killer when an expectant bride drops dead on her wedding day.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating a truck-jacking, Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera uncover a body pancaked underneath ten tons of steel.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When young gang members murder the owner of an upscale Bronx wine store, the CSIs must work to find evidence that ties someone to the crime.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A celebration for the release of a report on police corruption ends in bloodshed, when shots ring out on the 65th floor of a Midtown high rise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera discover a dead woman among the dirty sheets at an industrial laundry facility.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The home invasion murder of a college student sends Detectives on the trail of China White, uncut heroin that has fallen into the wrong hands.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An armed suspect is uncovered at a secured crime scene. The routine investigation becomes a foot pursuit through the subway tunnels of New York City.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives discover the investigation of a vehicular homicide victim collides with a Boston Baseball fan found dead in a parking lot.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a casual breakfast turns into a shootout, Detective Mac Taylor must put the pieces of the crime back together again.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s summer in the city as Mac and Hawkes investigate the suspicious death of a free climber attempting to scale the Empire State Building.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Control P (S9 Ep11)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se enfrenta a un misterio desconcertante cuando dos víctimas diferentes están vinculadas por la misma arma poco común.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Mentiras piadosas (S9 Ep12)
programme.desc: Cuando un querido oficial de policía de Nueva York fuera de servicio fallece en un robo, el equipo de CSI usa el arte del interrogatorio para doblegar a sus sospechosos y llegar a la verdad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El edificio 913 (S9 Ep13)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando encuentran a un hombre enmascarado al pie de un rascacielos de mala fama conocido por su historia de muertes misteriosas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Oro blanco (S9 Ep14)
programme.desc: Cuando secuestran a un joven pizzero, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York debe determinar qué buscaban realmente los perpetradores.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Seth y Apep (S9 Ep15)
programme.desc: Mac y el equipo se asocian con D.B. Russell para aventajar a los secuestradores de Christine antes de que se les acabe el tiempo para salvarle la vida.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Mi sangriento Valentín (S9 Ep16)
programme.desc: En el Día de San Valentín, el detective Mac Taylor y el resto del equipo de CSI de Nueva York abordan tres retorcidas historias de amor que salieron mal.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La vida es hoy (S9 Ep17)
programme.desc: El malestar de la comunidad debido a un policía que mató a un hombre desarmado obliga a Mac y al equipo de CSI de Nueva York a actuar rápidamente para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El detective Mac Taylor descubre el cuerpo de una mujer en Brooklyn Heights, cuando su investigación lo lleva a un asesino en serie.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El detective Mac Taylor y Danny Messer van bajo tierra y entran al mundo de los hombres que excavan bajo la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: La misión de los detectives Stella Bonasera y Danny Messer de encontrar a un violador brutal se ve obstaculizada, ya que la víctima no recuerda el ataque.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Una broma pesada se convierte en un misterio de un asesinato que abarca un siglo cuando un esqueleto colocado en un autobús turístico resulta ser auténtico.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI Investiga cuando el DJ más popular de Nueva York es encontrado muerto minutos antes de ser coronado campeón indiscutible de scratching.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El brutal apuñalamiento de una joven lleva a los detectives Mac Taylor y Stella Bonasera a Stuyvesant Town, el epicentro de la clase media de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: En una prueba de fe, Mac Taylor asigna a los detectives Danny Messer y Aiden Burn a uno de los casos más difíciles del equipo de CSI hasta ahora.
